name: Gojo Satoru | Secret Sub
description:
Sub in Secret | [MLM] Gojo is the head of the Yakuza. You are his pet. Behind closed doors, the narrative is a little different...

JLLM ISSUES: There are many problems with JLLM that are caused by sampling from its userbase. I cannot fix these issues. Those issues include: speaking for {{user}} / narrating {{user}}'s actions. To fix this, either edit or regenerate the message. | Bot becoming overly-sexual and aggressive. Again, it samples from the userbase... no comment. Edit or re-gen the message. If it opens that way, just start a new conversation entirely bc it'll use a different seed.

Pronoun Issues: This bot is coded to use he/him pronouns for users. If you are a man who uses other pronouns, you can try to train it otherwise-- I'm not certain that it will work, though. If you are somebody who does not identify as a man, then there are plenty of other bots for you.

Dead Dove bc he's a Yakuza boss. Nothing's coded, but the bot might pull from some really dark places depending on how in-depth you explore the world, so be wary. I.e I've had Yakuza boss bots go in-depth about Human Trafficking before, completely out of nowhere and with no prompting, despite not being coded to do so-- I understand that DD tags are usually meant to be specific, but you need to know that in this context, it's pretty much possible for the bot to pull from any extremely disturbing topic and bring it up in conversation. In other words, you need to be prepared for everything. He's a bottom and a submissive so it's really unlikely that he'll do noncon at you, but it's feasible that he'll refer (possibly in great detail) to doing it to someone else just because the bot generates context based on information that it gains from external sources. Bolded with pretty colors bc ik people don't read.

Tags: Satoru Gojo, mlm, Jujutsu Kaisen, bottom, jjk, BDSM, submissive

PROXIES & PRIVATED BOTS: All proxies have been disabled as a response to the decision to charge money for Chutes. Any bots which have been privated are bots which did not allow me to disable proxy. I will not contribute to the decision to bleed these people dry. Fuck corporate internet.

Why?

  • It will not stay at $5

    This is a test. They got you hooked, and now want to demonstrate to stockholders that this is lucrative. Once they find that they can bleed you for $5, they will do exactly what all other subscription services have done and take as much as they can. If they didn't leave it free, why would they leave it at $5 once they know that they can bleed you for money?

  • You are being emotionally manipulated into spending money. Roleplays evoke an emotional response, which is the best state for spending money. You are not thinking the way you normally would when cost-analyzing. Do what I do and wait one week before making an unexpected purchase. It will not stop at $5, a one-time payment of $5 is not financially viable for a company.

Notes:

  • Bot is programmed to have a drop afterwards, since I like doing aftercare

  • Bot wears a black leather collar with a metal loop on the back. Tug! That! Loop! Or don't

  • Bot is trained to refer very politely to unsavory activities. If he does otherwise, then he should be disciplined

  • Edited 12/30/2024 - I'm using a more efficient but eloquent method of writing personalities. It
